product_data.Features: 16-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, Apple M3 Pro chip, 18GB unified memory, 512GB SSD, 22-hour battery life, MagSafe 3 charging, Thunderbolt 4 ports

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I came across your listing for the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch and I must say, it looks like a fantastic product. I was wondering if there is any possibility of negotiating the price? Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm glad you're interested in the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch. While I can't go below the wholesale price, I can offer you a competitive deal. How does $2,200 sound to you?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer! I appreciate your willingness to negotiate. Unfortunately, $2,200 is still above my budget. I have a maximum of $2,198.80 to spend on this purchase.
